mapper.sql: i.id, i.station_id, s.name AS station_name, i.name, i.sort_index, i.rated_power_kw, i.status, i.model, i.manufacturer, i.serial_no, i.firmware_version, i.install_date, i.mppt_channels, i.dc_input_voltage_v, i.ac_output_voltage_v, i.grid_frequency_hz, i.module_temperature_c, i.ambient_temperature_c, i.string_count, i.panels_per_string
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sa_inverter i JOIN sa_station s ON s.id = i.station_id ORDER BY s.sort_index, i.sort_index

SELECT
FROM sa_inverter i JOIN sa_station s ON s.id = i.station_id WHERE i.station_id = #{stationId} ORDER BY i.sort_index

SELECT
FROM sa_inverter i JOIN sa_station s ON s.id = i.station_id WHERE i.id = #{inverterId} LIMIT 1
